channel.title: Development Economics - Tag - 滑翔闪'S BLOG
channel.description: Development Economics - Tag - 滑翔闪'S BLOG
channel.copyright: This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial 4.0 International License.

item.title: Distortion or Surprise: Making Policy Evaluation Interesting
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: An introduction to three papers and how their research design makes policy evaluation narratives more compelling.

item.title: One-Time Government Investment and Long-Run Industrial Development
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: Three papers on government investment and long-run economic effects

item.title: Development Economics: Marginal Analysis and Inframarginal Analysis (Introduction)
item.author: 滑翔闪
item.description: This article reviews the introduction to Yang Xiaokai’s work on inframarginal analysis in development economics and highlights several arguments about division of labor, growth, and the history of development theory.
